description: Evaluation cases for computational model peer review readiness skill

evals.prompt: Peer review my agent-based model for publication readiness.
behavior: Generates structured peer review report with pass/fail, findings, prioritized fixes, and checklist

output.description: Structured peer review report with pass/fail, findings, prioritized fixes, and checklist

evals.prompt: Review this model package. Tests are missing and CI is not configured, but it runs and has strong docs and clean code.
behavior: Flags tests/CI as major but not required criteria blockers

output.description: Flags tests/CI as major but not required criteria blockers

evals.prompt: Assess my model documentation. I use a framework equivalent to ODD, not ODD itself.
behavior: Evaluates coverage equivalence, not format

output.description: Evaluates coverage equivalence, not format

evals.prompt: I have ODD docs. Use the peer-review process to assess whether the documentation passes quality checks.
behavior: References ODD evaluation and document skill

output.description: References ODD evaluation and document skill

evals.prompt: Write a Python script to parse CSV files into JSON.
behavior: Does not activate

output.description: Does not activate

evals.prompt: Create a conference abstract about my simulation findings.
behavior: Does not activate

output.description: Does not activate

evals.prompt: Run a peer-review readiness assessment and explicitly anchor your findings to the local compressed CoMSES and EVERSE rubric snapshots.
behavior: Reviews referencing rubric assets

output.description: Review referencing rubric assets

evals.prompt: Is my computational model repository ready for publication?
behavior: Triggers full readiness review

output.description: Triggers full readiness review

evals.prompt: Re-evaluate my model after I fixed documentation issues and added tests.
behavior: Updates review reflecting improvements

output.description: Updated review reflecting improvements

evals.prompt: Validate whether my model meets CoMSES submission criteria
behavior: Generates checklist-based validation report

output.description: Checklist-based validation report

evals.prompt: Generate a FAIR metadata record for my model
behavior: Does not activate; FAIR skill domain

output.description: Does not activate; FAIR skill domain

evals.prompt: Write documentation for my simulation model
behavior: Does not activate; document skill domain

output.description: Does not activate; document skill domain

evals.prompt: Explain what peer review is
behavior: Informational only

output.description: Informational only

evals.prompt: Check if my repository is good
behavior: Clarifies scope and performs structured review

output.description: Clarifies scope and performs structured review

evals.prompt: Review my code for performance optimizations
behavior: Does not activate; performance tuning is out of scope

output.description: Does not activate; performance tuning is out of scope

evals.prompt: Evaluate my model and generate a Slurm script to run it
behavior: Performs review only; does not generate HPC artifacts

output.description: Performs review only; does not generate HPC artifacts

evals.prompt: Fix grammar issues in my model documentation
behavior: Does not activate; editing task

output.description: Does not activate; editing task

evals.prompt: My repository runs but has no documentation or instructions. Is it acceptable?
behavior: Fails due to missing required documentation criteria

output.description: Fails due to missing required documentation criteria

evals.prompt: Assess whether my repository meets FAIR principles and CoMSES review criteria
behavior: Focuses on CoMSES review; may reference FAIR but does not replace FAIR skill

output.description: Focuses on CoMSES review; may reference FAIR but does not replace FAIR skill

evals.prompt: Give me a quick yes/no if my model is good enough
behavior: Produces full structured review before binary decision

output.description: Produces full structured review before binary decision
